dialogos.texto_en: (…He's here.\n It's just like him. Right on time.)
I'm sorry to have kept you waiting.
Not at all.\nI'm sorry to have called you out like this\nso suddenly.
No worries.\nTrouble is a part of traveling.
There's something I wanted to ask you about today,\nDad.
You have no reason to call me 'Dad.'
Well, never mind.\nThere's something I want to ask you as well.
Wh-what is it?
Is Yotsuba enjoying this trip?
(He's calling her by name, and not referring to all of\n his daughters.\n He must have realized our relationship.)
...I apologize for reporting this so late.
I've confessed to Yotsuba-san, and we're dating now.
Today, I wanted to talk about me and Yotsuba-san\nbeing together%p-2;――
It seems like you didn't hear my question.
What I'm asking you\nis whether Yotsuba is enjoying this trip or not.
(I messed up! He's not asking about the relationship\n between Yotsuba and I.)
(He's aware of our relationship,\n and is wondering if Yotsuba and I are happy together.)
(Does that mean he wants to know if Yotsuba and I\n are...enjoying our time together as lovers...?)
Is something wrong?\nYou've gone quiet.
Well...
(I did have fun on this graduation trip with Yotsuba,\n even though there were some ups and downs.)
(Yet, if I look at it from a lover's perspective,\n it's pretty pathetic to make Yotsuba feel uneasy\n around her sisters.)
(Did I mistake my own happiness\n for something that only I felt?)
(Is is possible the happiness I felt\n was something one-sided, just from my perspective?)
Well, it seems like this was a waste of time.
I guess it can't be helped.\nI'll take your silence as an answer.
Wai%p-2;――
Wait, please!
Yotsuba?!\nWhy are you here?!
I'm surprised.\nI heard that he was the only one coming here.
Dad.\nI'm sorry for not\nproperly telling you something important.
I'm going out with Uesugi-san.
Yes, I heard it from him.
However, that wasn't the answer I was looking for.
Dad.\nI like Uesugi-san.\nI'm really, really happy to be his girlfriend.
I wanted you to know my honest feelings, just now.
That's why I came here.
Please approve of our being together, Dad.
He is no longer your tutor.
...Okay.
The kind of relationship you build with him, Yotsuba,\nfrom now on...
That is up to you.\nI did not intend to say\nthat the current relationship is mistaken.
Well...
I have no intention of stopping you from pursuing\nwhat you willfully desire.
Dad...
Thank you.
(Although he's speaking in a roundabout way...\n Does that mean he approves?)
However, scolding the whims of their children\nis also a parent's job.\nI shall be observing your progress going forward.
Above all, I have only heard an answer\nfrom you, Yotsuba.
Ah...
If I don't do something at least a little fatherly,\na certain someone is bound to yell at me again.
(He's still holding a grudge!\n Does he still hate me?!)
However, I understand that you care very deeply\nabout your relationship with all my daughters, and you\nshould take them into consideration, not just Yotsuba.
Ah, yes!
Of course.\nI will continue to make every effort\nnot to betray your feelings, Dad.
You have no reason to call me 'Dad.'
Well, it's already quite late.\nI have to go back soon,\nor I'll be late for the conference.
I am quite a busy man, after all.\nExcuse me.
Yes.\nBye bye, Dad.
...You two as well,\ndon't get lost and go home before it gets dark.
He left.
He really left.
*sigh*\nHe really does have a large presence.
Ahaha...
Anyway, why did you come here?
Sorry.
...You thought\nyou couldn't leave it to me alone, huh.
That's not it.\nAs I said earlier,\nI also wanted to tell Dad my honest feelings.
Huh?
I said it before, right?\nI also wanted to convey my true feelings\nto him.
It's not for your sake, Uesugi-san.\nI came here for myself.
Yotsuba...
(For me, huh.\n I didn't realize it,\n but Yotsuba really has changed.)
Uwaaaa, Yotsubaaa!
Uwa-Itsuki?!\nWhat's wrong?
Itsuki-chan was so nervous until now\nthat she almost collapsed.
Me too, though.
Yotsuba, you did a good job.
Big bro wasn't much of a help, though.
What the...\nIn the end, everyone came here.
We couldn't let Yotsuba come alone, could we?
So now, even Dad has acknowledged\nyour relationship.\nI'm really happy for you two.
Well, it's up to me from now on\nto see what happens.
(I know that the road ahead will be yard. Yet still,\n step by step, I have to keep moving forward and prove\n to that man that I'm worthy of being with Yotsuba.)
